title: Craftable Mini-Blocks
description: Lets you create mini versions of many blocks with a Stonecutter!
body:
![Mini-blocks used to label each barrel's content in a storage system ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aTTjGqmo/images/473f4c6a2570290391cda70e04fb3c483f7643e3.png)

Lets you create mini versions of many blocks with a Stonecutter!

This Data Pack takes advantage of the new custom recipes introduced in 1.20.5 to create a more immersive than ever experience on using Mini-Blocks! No Knowledge Books, no Wandering Traders, all is just in your local Stonecutter! You could even fool me this was Vanilla!

Currently, pretty much all full blocks in the Building Blocks and Natural Blocks have a mini-block version, plus a lot of Colored and Utility ones!

Just be aware that once you cut your block into pieces, there's no way to get the original block back! So think carefully before building with mini Netherite Blocks or mini Beacons!

All the Mini-Blocks also come with Note Block sounds! Most use their regular placing/breaking sounds, but some may add more unique possibilities for your next Note Block creation!

In addition to that, the data pack now also makes custom heads retain all of their data when placed and broken, plus makes you able to mine them faster with any tool! So don't worry about having to spend a lot of time cleaning up when you need to destroy them!

Hope you have fun!
